description_long: This object is a rectangular, handheld electronic device resembling a classic video game controller. The front face features a prominent white D-pad on the left, two small rectangular buttons in the center, and two round pink buttons labeled 'B' and 'A' on the right, along with red Chinese characters above them. The body is primarily black with angular white and gray accents at the corners, giving it a modern, stylized appearance. The sides are plain and solid black, while the back is mostly featureless except for some faint markings. The device appears to be made of hard plastic, with visible seams and a glossy finish. Its compact size and button layout suggest it is designed for manual operation, likely for gaming or remote control purposes.
description: A compact, black rectangular electronic device with a white D-pad, two pink round buttons, and red Chinese characters, resembling a classic game controller.
description_view_0: The front view shows the full control interface, including the D-pad, two central buttons, two round pink buttons, and red Chinese characters.
description_view_1: The left side view reveals a plain, solid black edge with no visible features or controls.
description_view_2: The back view displays a mostly featureless black surface with faint markings and angular accents.
description_view_3: The right side view is similar to the left, showing a plain black edge without any controls or distinguishing features.
